verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Through you the blind will see Through you the mute will sing Through you the dead will rise Through you all hearts will praise Through you the darkness flees Through you my heart screams I am free, Yes, I am free.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am free to run (I am free to run) I am free to dance (I am free to dance) I am free to live for you (I am free to live for you) I am free, (I am free) Yes I am free, (I am free)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through you the kingdom comes Through you the battle's won Through you I'm not afraid Through you the price is paid Through you there's victory Because of you my heart sings, I am free, Yes, I am free.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who the son sets free-is free indeed (Who the son sets free) Who the son sets free-is free indeed (Who the son sets free)
